title: Minnesota Association of Disability Examiners (MADE) — By-Laws
description: Governing by-laws of the Minnesota Association of Disability Examiners (MADE), a chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) in the Great Lakes Region. Covers chapter name, NADE relationship, definitions, purposes, membership, meetings (spring and fall), elections, officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary-Treasurer), the Board of Directors, the five standing committees (By-Laws and Resolution, Nominating, Professional Standards, Conference and Program, Membership), parliamentary authority, amendments, and the Convention of Delegates.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Minnesota Chapter (MADE)
source.title: By-Laws of the Minnesota Association of Disability Examiners (MADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Minnesota-const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived. The document is titled 'By-Laws' (it references but does not separately reproduce a constitution). NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
